title: Limited Power of Attorney
description: A limited authorization for an agent to act on behalf of a principal for defined matters.

sections.heading: Appointment
sections.body: {{principal_name}}, residing at {{principal_address}}, appoints {{agent_name}}, residing at {{agent_address}}, as agent and attorney-in-fact for the limited purposes described in this document.

sections.heading: Powers Granted
sections.body: The agent may act on behalf of the principal only for the following matters: {{powers_granted}}.

sections.heading: Limitations
sections.body: The agent may not delegate authority, make gifts, change beneficiary designations, or take any action outside the powers expressly granted unless separately authorized by law or written instrument.

sections.heading: Effective Period
sections.body: This power of attorney is effective on {{effective_date}} and expires on {{expiration_date}}, unless revoked earlier in writing by the principal.

sections.heading: Reliance
sections.body: Third parties may rely on a copy of this document as if it were an original, subject to applicable law.

sections.heading: Governing Law
sections.body: This document is governed by the laws of {{governing_law}}.

review_notes: Check notarization, witness, statutory form, and recording requirements.
Confirm whether durable authority is intended or prohibited.
Specify exact transactions or institutions when a broad grant would be inappropriate.
